subject: [STRIMZI] Upgrade to "Kraft" based Kafka
commit_message:
[STRIMZI] Upgrade to "Kraft" based Kafka

- Update to new "KRaft" based Kafka deployment and replace Zookeeper
- Preparation for new Strimzi version 0.46.0

Issue-ID: OOM-3344

Change-Id: I13c8a23f61ba05eaf1fc7323670db6d659f5e6cb
Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
